NOTICE OF MOTION ANDM OTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL, ENFORCE SETTLEMENT, AND ENTER JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY (PLAINTIFF FROM CONSOLIDATED CASE #499802) HEARING SET FOR JAN-28-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY (PLAINTIFF FROM CONSOLIDATED CASE #499802)

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL, ENFORCE SETTLEMENT, AND ENTER JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE DISMISSAL OF THE CONSOLIDATED MATTER OF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU V. GABRIEL DIAMOND REGUS (CGC-10-498991) ERRONEOUSLY INCLUDED THE MATTER OF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY V. GABRIEL REGUS (CGC-10-499802). THE DISMISSAL IS SET ASIDE AS TO OF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY V. GABRIEL REGUS (CGC-10-499802) PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 473(B). JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT GABRIEL REGUS IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,140.14 PLUS INTEREST AND COSTS PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION FILED ON MARCH 22, 2013. DEFENDANT HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT HE COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION, AS THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT PAID PLAINTIFF $ 1,000 BY JANUARY 31, 2013. THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE STAYED 30 DAYS TO GIVE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO PAY PLAINTIFF THE $ 1,000. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO PAY WITHIN 30 DAYS, JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion Andm Otion To Set Aside Dismissal, Enforce Settlement, And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal, Enforce Settlement, And Enter Judgment is Granted. The dismissal of the consolidated matter of California State Automobile Association Inter-Insurance Bureau v. Gabriel Diamond Regus (CGC-10-498991) erroneously included the matter of State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company v. Gabriel Regus (CGC-10-499802). The dismissal is set aside as to of State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company v. Gabriel Regus (CGC-10-499802) pursuant to CCP sec. 473(b). Judgment shall be entered against Defendant Gabriel Regus in the amount of $4,140.14 plus interest and costs pursuant to the Stipulation filed on March 22, 2013. Defendant has not established that he complied with the terms of the Stipulation, as there is no evidence that Defendant paid Plaintiff $ 1,000 by January 31, 2013. The Judgment shall be stayed 30 days to give Defendant an opportunity to pay Plaintiff the $ 1,000. If Defendant fails to pay within 30 days, Judgment shall be entered. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

Notice Of Motion Andm Otion To Set Aside Dismissal, Enforce Settlement, And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Continued To Feb-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal, Enforce Settlement, And Enter Judgment is continued to February 11, 2014 per agreement of the parties. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
